Bus Timings

X13 Bus Timings Lulu Village to Satwa Bus Station

December 4, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route offers a reliable public transit option with scheduled stops at various landmarks and facilities along its path.

Bus Timings

The X13 bus operates throughout the day with regular intervals. It runs from early morning until late at night, ensuring accessibility for commuters at various times. The schedule includes frequent stops to accommodate passengers along its route, starting from Lulu Village with the last stop at Satwa Bus Station · 12.

From Lulu Village From Satwa Bus Station
05:05 06:02
05:25 06:22
05:45 06:42
06:05 07:02
06:27 07:24
06:45 07:42
07:02 07:59
07:20 08:17
07:40 08:37
07:59 08:56
08:17 09:14
08:34 09:31
08:47 09:44
09:02 09:59
09:20 10:17
09:33 10:30
09:47 10:44
10:02 10:59
10:20 11:17
10:35 11:32

11:19 12:16

12:00 12:57

13:35 14:32

14:15 15:12

23:20 00:17

Download PDF Bus X13

Bus X13 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the X13 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The X13 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Lulu Village

  2. New Housing

  3. Emirates Housing

  4. Russian International School

  5. Galadari Driving School

  6. Al Nahda, The Sheffeild Private School 1

  7. Al Nahda, 19A Street

  8. Madina Supermarket

  9. Canary Building

  10. NMC Hospital

  11. Mahlab School

  12. Abu Hail, Clinic

  13. Naif, Intersection

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station External

  2. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 3

  3. Department of Ports & Customs

  4. Capital Hotel

  5. Dhiyafa, Road, 2

  6. Satwa, Masjid

  7. Satwa Bus Station · 12

Al Nahda, Emirates College Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Nahda, Emirates College Bus Stop serves as a significant transit point where Routes X13, F08, and 24 intersect. This location provides convenient access for students, staff, and visitors to the Emirates College, offering easy connections to various parts of Dubai. The intersection of these routes ensures seamless travel and enhances the connectivity of the Al Nahda area with other key destinations.

Also See: Complete Guide to Abu Dhabi Bus 103: Route and Stops

Bus Ticket Price

Expect to pay around AED 3 for a Dubai X13 bus ticket.

Bus Booking

Dubai Bus X13 does not currently offer online booking facilities. For updated schedules and route information, commuters can refer to official RTA publications or use RTA’s mobile app.

Read More: Dubai Bus F32: Route and Stops Explained

Journey Experience

Though lengthy, the route provides a rich snapshot of Dubai’s varied neighborhoods, from its traditional heritage to its modern-day vibrancy.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can easily reach Satwa Bus Station · 12, the endpoint of the X13 bus route originating from Lulu Village. This service offers a convenient and cost-effective transportation option with fares ranging between AED 72 to 87. Whether commuting for work, leisure, or daily errands, Careem ensures a reliable journey across Dubai’s bustling cityscape, catering to diverse passenger needs with efficiency and comfort.

In conclusion, Dubai Bus X13 serves as an essential transportation link connecting residential areas, educational institutions, and commercial hubs between Lulu Village and Satwa Bus Station · 12. With its comprehensive route and frequent timings, the X13 bus provides a convenient and accessible option for commuters navigating Dubai’s diverse urban landscape.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 4, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
